column1: # Intent objects — concrete code/architecture nouns. Combined with an intent
# verb in router.sh, they promote a prompt to Standard tier. A bare verb
# without one of these (and without a path / extension / backtick) stays Light.
# Format: one term per line. ASCII terms get word-boundary matching; CJK
# terms get substring matching. Same loader as the hooks/data/*.tsv files.
# Keep this list focused: it should fire on "real" technical objects, not on
# casual mentions. If you find a term creating false positives, remove it.
